name: Terrors of the Overroot
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>現世</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウツシヨ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>離</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バナ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>レ
desc: Target 1 card your opponent controls and 1 card in their GY; send that card on the field to the GY, and if you do, Set the other card from the GY to your opponent's field. You can only activate 1 "Terrors of the Overroot" per turn.
eff: Target 1 card your opponent controls and 1 card in their GY; send that card on the field to the GY, and if you do, Set the other card from the GY to your opponent's field. You can only activate 1 "Terrors of the Overroot" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
Sets from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
